title: rosa stylosa var. fastigiata
intro: Rosa stylosa var. fastigiata, also known as the 'Tall Fastigiate Rose', is a type of climbing rose plant native to China and the Himalayas. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating wounds, fever, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Rosa stylosa var. fastigiata include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and promoting healthy skin. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various health issues.
